title: Phyllanthus arnottianus
taxonomy: Phyllanthus arnottianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Phyllanthus family. This family is part of the order Malpighiales and is a member of the clade eurosids I in the APG III classification system. The class is Magnoliopsida, which is the flowering plant class. The kingdom it belongs to is Plantae, which includes all plants. It also belongs to the division Magnoliophyta, which is the flowering plant division.
uses: Phyllanthus arnottianus is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, and its medicinal uses have been explored in traditional folk medicine.
